env_files.role: SQLite sales data for product comparison
Product notes and distractor product roles
Brochure-style brief with relevant product, audience, and visual context.
env_files.license_note: Wikimedia Commons Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 2.0; verify attribution details on the source page.
env_files.conversion_note: Original case text and rules were combined with a cached public Wikimedia image, then regenerated as a brochure-style PDF. The standalone image file is not exposed as an env file.

source_policy.web_usage_note: Follow web_policy. Closed-env cases should be solved from cached env files only.

notes: Web search is required only for current Instagram feed size/aspect guidance.
